name: Frozen Maple Syrup Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat egg yolks with sugar and 1/4 cup maple syrup until light and fluffy.
2. Heat the remaining 1/4 cup maple syrup until boiling. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff; gradually add warm maple syrup.
4. Whip cream into stiff peaks in a separate bowl.
5. Mix all three bowls together and fill individual serving dishes.
6. Freeze for at least 4 hours.
